ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment model */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when production started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when production ended */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_models_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES equipment_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment specification */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment model the specification belongs to */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the equipment (e.g., 20t/h) */,
  "power" TEXT /* Power consumption of the equipment (e.g., 5.5kW) */,
  "mechanical_dimensions" TEXT /* Mechanical dimensions of the equipment (e.g., 5400x3380x2505mm) */,
  "belt_size" TEXT /* Belt size of the equipment (e.g., 17000x2500mm) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the equipment */,
  "operating_temperature" TEXT /* Operating temperature range */,
  "operating_pressure" TEXT /* Operating pressure range */,
  "noise_level" TEXT /* Noise level in decibels */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications and compliance (e.g., CE, UL) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the equipment in kilograms */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_specifications_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment type (e.g., conveyor belt, pump, motor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the equipment type (e.g., material handling, fluid handling) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the equipment type */,
  "standardization" TEXT /* Standardization level (e.g., ISO, ASME) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_manufacturing" (
  "manufacturing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturing record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment model being manufactured */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of manufacturing */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "manufacturing_batch" TEXT /* Batch number for manufacturing */,
  "quality_inspection" TEXT /* Quality inspection status (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of quality inspection */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "manufacturing_cost" REAL /* Cost of manufacturing the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_manufacturing_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment model in inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment in inventory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the equipment in inventory */,
  "last_inventory_check" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the equipment (e.g., new, used, refurbished) */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "purchased_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was purchased */,
  "purchased_cost" REAL /* Cost of purchasing the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_inventory_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment model being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine check, repair, replacement) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_location" TEXT /* Location where maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_maintenance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance schedule */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment model being scheduled */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date of scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance scheduled */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Name of the maintenance personnel assigned */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the maintenance (1-5) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance schedule (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment model being monitored */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of performance monitoring */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Performance metric being monitored (e.g., speed, temperature, vibration) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "performance_status" TEXT /* Status of the performance (e.g., normal, abnormal) */,
  "alert_generated" INTEGER /* Whether an alert was generated based on performance */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES equipment_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, maintenance personnel) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
